description_long: This humanoid robot features a geometric, angular design with a trapezoidal torso, cylindrical limbs, and a polygonal head. The head has a distinct blue rectangular panel on the front, possibly functioning as a visual sensor or display. The arms and legs are separated from the torso, each limb ending in a rounded, simplified form without visible hands or feet. The robot's surface is predominantly gray with a matte finish, and the blue panel adds a touch of color contrast. The overall build suggests a lightweight, modular construction, with visible joints at the shoulders, hips, and neck. The robot's design is minimalistic, with no visible clothing or decorative elements, emphasizing function over form.
description: A gray, angular humanoid robot with a blue facial panel, modular limbs, and a minimalist, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the trapezoidal torso, separated cylindrical limbs, and the polygonal head with a blue panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the torso, the protruding head with the blue panel, and the alignment of the limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the torso and head, with the limbs arranged around the body and no visible blue panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side profile of the head, torso, and limbs, with the blue panel partially visible.
attribute_pose: The robot is in a neutral, upright pose with its torso vertical, head facing forward, and arms and legs separated and slightly apart from the body.
attribute_clothing_style: The robot is unclothed, featuring only integrated panels and structural components with no decorative or fabric coverings.
attribute_facial_features: The face consists of a flat polygonal surface with a prominent blue rectangular panel, lacking traditional eyes, mouth, or nose. No expressive elements are present.
attribute_limb_articulation: The robot has visible articulation points at the shoulders, hips, and neck, suggesting hinge or rotary joints. The limbs appear rigid with no visible hands or feet.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: A single blue panel on the front of the head, likely functioning as a visual sensor or display; no other sensors visible.
